about.titula: Master Engineer in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
about.kratkiOpis: Master engineer in electrical engineering and computer science with experience in software development and user interface design.

intro.paragraph1: I’m a master engineer in electrical engineering and computer science with a strong interest in building well-structured software systems and thoughtfully designed user interfaces. I enjoy working across both frontend and backend, focusing on solutions that are reliable, clear, and carefully engineered from end to end.
intro.paragraph2: My background has shaped a methodical approach to problem-solving, with an emphasis on structure, maintainability, and long-term clarity. I work comfortably with both client-side and server-side development, and I enjoy understanding how systems function as a whole — from data and logic to interface and interaction.
intro.paragraph3: I’m particularly drawn to projects where engineering discipline meets clean, intentional design. Whether I’m working on application logic, APIs, or user-facing interfaces, I value consistency, performance, and attention to detail.
intro.paragraph4: Outside of work, I enjoy spending time outdoors, walking, and exploring creative interests such as drawing, music, and 3D modeling. I value continuous learning, craftsmanship, and building things with care.
